segments.text: They say,
If a man divorces his wife, And she goes from him And becomes another man's, May he return to her again?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Would not that land be greatly polluted?
But you have played the harlot with many lovers;
Yet return to Me
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Lift up your eyes to the desolate heights and see: Where have you not lain with men? By the road you have sat for them Like an Arabian in the wilderness; And you have polluted the land With your harlotries and your wickedness.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Therefore the showers have been withheld, And there has been no latter rain. You have had a harlot's forehead; You refuse to be ashamed.
Will you not from this time cry to Me, 'My Father, You are the guide of my youth?'
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Will He remain angry forever? Will He keep it to the end?
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Behold, you have spoken and done evil things, As you were able.
Have you seen what backsliding Israel has done? She has gone up on every high mountain and under every green tree, and there played the harlot.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I said, after she had done all these things,
Return to Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: But she did not return. And her treacherous sister Judah saw it.

Then I saw that for all the causes for which backsliding Israel had committed adultery, I had put her away and given her a certificate of divorce; yet her treacherous sister Judah did not fear, but went and played the harlot also.
So it came to pass, through her casual harlotry, that she defiled the land and committed adultery with stones and trees.
And yet for all this her treacherous sister Judah has not turned to Me with her whole heart, but in pretense
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Backsliding Israel has shown herself more righteous than treacherous Judah.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Go and proclaim these words toward the north, and say:
Return, backsliding Israel. I will not cause My anger to fall on you. For I am merciful. I will not remain angry forever.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Only acknowledge your iniquity, That you have transgressed against the Lord your God, And have scattered your charms To alien deities under every green tree, And you have not obeyed My voice
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Return, O backsliding children. For I am married to you. I will take you, one from a city and two from a family, and I will bring you to Zion.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I will give you shepherds according to My heart, who will feed you with knowledge and understanding.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then it shall come to pass, when you are multiplied and increased in the land in those days, that they will say no more, 'The ark of the covenant of the Lord.' It shall not come to mind, nor shall they remember it, nor shall they visit it, nor shall it be made anymore.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: At that time Jerusalem shall be called The Throne of the Lord, and all the nations shall be gathered to it, to the name of the Lord, to Jerusalem. No more shall they follow the dictates of their evil hearts.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: In those days the house of Judah shall walk with the house of Israel, and they shall come together out of the land of the north to the land that I have given as an inheritance to your fathers.
How can I put you among the children And give you a pleasant land, A beautiful heritage of the hosts of nations? You shall call Me, 'My Father,' And not turn away from Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Surely, as a wife treacherously departs from her husband, So have you dealt treacherously with Me, O house of Israel
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: A voice was heard on the desolate heights, Weeping and supplications of the children of Israel. For they have perverted their way; They have forgotten the Lord their God.
Return, you backsliding children, And I will heal your backslidings.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Indeed we do come to You, For You are the Lord our God.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Truly, in vain is salvation hoped for from the hills, And from the multitude of mountains; Truly, in the Lord our God Is the salvation of Israel.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: For shame has devoured The labor of our fathers from our youth— Their flocks and their herds, Their sons and their daughters.

We lie down in our shame, And our reproach covers us. For we have sinned against the Lord our God, We and our fathers, From our youth even to this day, And have not obeyed the voice of the Lord our God.
segments.speaker: Israel
